description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a gable roof. The front of the house has a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is flanked by two palm trees. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, as well as landscaped areas with several trees. The exterior is finished in light colors, with contrasting dark window frames and railings. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, and a backyard pool area. The property features a driveway, palm trees, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, driveway, palm trees, and part of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the side of the house with palm trees and driveway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps, flanked by palm trees and featuring a simple modern door.
